content.cn_text: 【珍妮】：你好，阿尔特夫。我是你的安居工作者，我叫珍妮。很高兴见到你。
content.en_text: [Jenny]: Hi, Altef. I'm your settlement worker and I'm called Jenny. It's great to meet you.

content.cn_text: 欢迎来到我们的城市。你会爱上多伦多的。【阿尔特夫】：我确定我会的。
content.en_text: Welcome to our city. You'll love Toronto. [Altef]: I'm sure I will.

content.cn_text: 【珍妮】：我有一些一般性的建议。首先，多伦多是个大地方。很多人来这里
content.en_text: [Jenny]: I have some general recommendations. First, Toronto is a big place. A lot of people who

content.cn_text: 选择住在西部。【阿尔特夫】：我明白了。有什么原因吗？
content.en_text: come here choose to live in the West. [Altef]: I see. Is there a reason for that?

content.cn_text: 【珍妮】：嗯，是的。这个社区有一个很棒的市场。所有当地人都知道。
content.en_text: [Jenny]: Well, yes. There's a great market in the neighborhood. All the local people know about it.

content.cn_text: 【阿尔特夫】：那对我们来说会很好。【珍妮】：我知道你还有年幼的孩子。
content.en_text: [Altef]: That would be good for us. [Jenny]: And I understand you have young children.

content.cn_text: 【阿尔特夫】：是的。
content.en_text: [Altef]: That's right.

content.cn_text: 【珍妮】：所以这个地区的另一个优点是，它有相当多的公园，孩子们可以在那里玩耍。
content.en_text: [Jenny]: So another advantage of this area is that it has quite a few parks where children can play.

content.cn_text: 【阿尔特夫】：哦，那太棒了。他们真的很喜欢户外活动。
content.en_text: [Altef]: Oh, that's great. They really like being outside.

content.cn_text: 【珍妮】：我其实知道这个区域有一套公寓可以租。我会安排你去看。
content.en_text: [Jenny]: I actually know of an apartment in the area that's available. I'll arrange for you to see

content.cn_text: 不过首先，我们来看看平面图，我告诉你去看的时候需要检查什么。
content.en_text: it. But first, let's look at the floor plan and I'll tell you what to check when you see it.

content.cn_text: 这间房是厨房。一定要打开冰箱。
content.en_text: This room here is the kitchen. Be sure to open the refrigerator.

content.cn_text: 【阿尔特夫】：看看它是否正常工作。【珍妮】：是的。并确保没有难闻的气味。
content.en_text: [Altef]: To see if it's working properly. [Jenny]: Yes. And to make sure that there's no nasty smell.

content.cn_text: 【阿尔特夫】：哦，还有别的吗？
content.en_text: [Altef]: Oh, anything else?

content.cn_text: 【珍妮】：嗯，检查一下电器情况会比较好。没有什么比插座不够更糟糕的了。
content.en_text: [Jenny]: Well, it would be good to check the electrical situation. There's nothing worse than not having enough plugs.

content.cn_text: 你至少需要四个。【阿尔特夫】：我会去看看。这图上是什么？
content.en_text: You'll need at least four. [Altef]: I'll look for those. What's this on the plan?

content.cn_text: 【珍妮】：嗯，那是客厅。这里是你通往小阳台的地方。
content.en_text: [Jenny]: Well, now that's the living room. And this is where you go outside to a small balcony.

content.cn_text: 看看门锁。确保它没有坏。
content.en_text: Have a look at the door lock. Be sure it's not broken.

content.cn_text: 【阿尔特夫】：我会的。有自己的地方想坐外面就坐外面，会很棒。
content.en_text: [Altef]: I will. It'll be nice to have our own place to sit outside when we want.

content.cn_text: 【珍妮】：是的，夏日晚餐后坐在外面非常舒服。我会好好看看客厅。
content.en_text: [Jenny]: Yes, it's very nice on a summer evening after dinner. And I'll have a good look around the living room.

content.cn_text: 房间的状况很重要，因为它是你主要的居住区域。
content.en_text: The condition of the room is important because it's your main living area.

content.cn_text: 特别是看看油漆。可能需要重新粉刷了。
content.en_text: Look at the paint in particular. It may be time to redo it.

content.cn_text: 【阿尔特夫】：我会检查的。【旁白】：现在，请听并回答问题7到10。
content.en_text: [Altef]: I'll check that. [Narrator]: Now, listen and answer a question seven to ten.

content.cn_text: 【珍妮】：现在，阿尔特夫。这个走廊通向浴室。当你查看时，务必检查水槽下方。那里经常会发现泄漏。
content.en_text: [Jenny]: Now, Altef. This hall leads to the bathroom. When you look at that, do check below the sink. Often that's the place you'll find a leak.

content.cn_text: 浴室里的瓷砖也应该状况良好。
content.en_text: And the tiles in the bathroom should be in good shape.

content.cn_text: 【阿尔特夫】：我同意。那这间房肯定是其中一间卧室了。这肯定是衣柜。我妻子想要一个大的。
content.en_text: [Altef]: I agree. Then this room must be one of the bedrooms. And this must be the closet. My wife wants a large one.

content.cn_text: 【珍妮】：我相信。我们都想要很多放衣服的空间。你还需要看看卧室窗外。
content.en_text: [Jenny]: I'm sure. We all want lots of room for our clothes. You'll also want to look outside the bedroom window.

content.cn_text: 它俯瞰街道，可能全天候都有很多噪音。
content.en_text: It overlooks the street and there might be a lot of noise at all times of the day and night.

content.cn_text: 我们生活在一个非常繁忙的城市。【阿尔特夫】：我明白了。那对我妻子和孩子们来说也是个问题。
content.en_text: We're in a very busy city. [Altef]: I see. That would be a problem for my wife and the boys too.

content.cn_text: 我一定会记住检查这一点。
content.en_text: I'll definitely remember to check that.

content.cn_text: 珍妮，大楼里还有其他什么东西吗？【珍妮】：你是指设施吗？
content.en_text: Jenny, what other things are in the building? [Jenny]: You mean the facilities?

content.cn_text: 【阿尔特夫】：是的。例如，我们会在哪里洗衣服？
content.en_text: [Altef]: Yes. For example, where will we do our laundry?

content.cn_text: 【珍妮】：像这种类型的大楼，它可能在地下室，但这里没有说明。
content.en_text: [Jenny]: With a building of this type, it's probably in the basement, but it doesn't say.

content.cn_text: 所以你需要去确认它的位置。你知道还有什么需要检查的吗？
content.en_text: So you'll need to check where it is. You know what's also really good to check for?

content.cn_text: 【阿尔特夫】：不，什么？【珍妮】：你需要检查每层楼是否有一个垃圾房。这样你就不用出门了。
content.en_text: [Altef]: No, what? [Jenny]: You need to check that there's a garbage room on every floor. Then you don't need to go

content.cn_text: 外面。【阿尔特夫】：好的。【珍妮】：好了，目前就这些。祝你好运，阿尔特夫。我们今天晚些时候再聊。
content.en_text: outside. [Altef]: Right. [Jenny]: Well, that's everything for now. Good luck, Altef. We'll talk later today.

content.cn_text: 【阿尔特夫】：谢谢你的帮助，珍妮。
content.en_text: [Altef]: Thanks for your help, Jenny.

groups.desc: Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer
groups.title: Questions 1-10.

items.title: The 1. ________ of the city of Toronto is a popular place to live.
There are several 3. ________ in the area.
Check there is not a bad 4. ________ in the fridge.
Make sure the 5. ________ is OK on the balcony door.
Look at the condition of the 6. ________ in the room.
Check for a 7. ________ under the sink.
Check for the amount of 8. ________ outside.
Find the location of the 9. ________ (possibly in the basement).
Check that every floor has a place for 10. ________.

groups.source_collect:

Conforming an apartment

• The $1$ of the city of Toronto is a popular place to live.
• The area has a well-known $2$.
• There are several $3$ in the area.
Apartment: things to check
Kitchen
• Check there is not a bad $4$ in the fridge.
Living room
• Make sure the $5$ is OK on the balcony door.
• Look at the condition of the $6$ in the room.
Bathroom
• Check for a $7$ under the sink.
Bedroom
• Check for the amount of $8$ outside.
Building facilities
• Find the location of the $9$ (possibly in the basement).
• Check that every floor has a place for $10$.
